title: HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE MARION COUNTY HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 3855 Wolverine Street NE Suite 6 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday/Wednesday 3pm-7pm Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Suggested donation of $25; no one turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing Safe Sex Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV+ CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ALLIANCE FOR COMMUNITY WELLNESS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIV ALLIANCE MARION COUNTY
